descriptionEn: A descendant of Zerubbabel (KJV "Zorobabel") who appears in Matthew's genealogy of Jesus Christ (Mt 1:13).
articleEn:
Eliakim (e?—li`a—kim). [Heb. 'Elyaqîm, "God establishes."
A descendant of Zerubbabel (KJV "Zorobabel") who appears in Matthew's genealogy of Jesus Christ (Mt 1:13).

images.caption: And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor; (Matthew 1:13)
